programme.title: Tour de France 2026
programme.desc: The world's greatest cycling race arrives on 5 with daily highlights from every stage of the event. Beginning with today's Grand Départ in Barcelona on July 4th, we follow the drama, spectacle and intensity of the peloton across three weeks of elite racing, as riders tackle punishing mountain climbs, high-speed sprints and unpredictable weather in their pursuit of the famous yellow jersey. Rebecca Charlton presents highlights from Stage 1 of the 2026 Tour de France as the race gets underway with a 19.6-kilometre individual time trial in Barcelona. Expert analysis and reaction accompany the key moments from the opening day of cycling's greatest race.

programme.title: Alexander Armstrong Across America
programme.desc: Alexander heads into the mountains of West Virginia. Deep in the Appalachians he finds a fiercely proud and independent group living light years away from the trappings of modern America, joining Nate, a homesteader who's rejected modern life and now lives off-grid, while sharing his lifestyle with thousands of followers online. Alexander then uncovers the industries and traditions that helped shape the state, from the coal mines that powered America's industrial rise to the moonshiners whose illicit trade became part of Appalachian folklore and identity. Along the way, he discovers West Virginia's unique role in the Civil War before uncovering one of the Cold War's most extraordinary secrets. He also steps into the wrestling ring to experience one of West Virginia's most popular forms of local entertainment, and ends his journey by exploring the rich musical heritage joining two musicians on stage at an open mic night. Series Prod: Ewen Thomson; Prod: Kitty McCargo-Walklate; Exec Prod: Clive Tulloh; Burning Bright Productions (S1 Ep2)
The presenter travels across the US, exploring this powerful and complex country.
